args.command:
config firewall address
edit "agent_192.168.1.3"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "Deny_ICMP_from_agent"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "agent_192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 2
set name "Allow_HTTPs_from_agent"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "agent_192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set service "HTTPS" "HTTP"
set nat enable
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end
